name: mcp-platform
description: Enterprise MCP platform MVP for governed connector, skill, and task operations.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mcp-platform/shared-types && npm run build -w @mcp-platform/policy-core && npm run build -w @mcp-platform/connector-sdk && npm run build -w @mcp-platform/skill-sdk && npm run build -w @mcp-platform/task-runner && npm run build -w @mcp-platform/gateway-client && npm run build -w @mcp-platform/connector-validator && npm run build -w @mcp-platform/api && npm run build -w @mcp-platform/web && npm run build -w @mcp-platform/local-knowledge-base && npm run build -w @mcp-platform/jira-connector
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:workspaces
scripts.platform:validate: npm run build && npm run test:workspaces && docker compose config
